nasb.text: When they took hold of you with the hand, You broke and tore all their hands; And when they leaned on you, You broke and made all their loins quake.”

esv.text: when they grasped you with the hand, you broke and tore all their shoulders; and when they leaned on you, you broke and made all their loins to shake.

cnv.text: 他們用手抓住你的時候， 你就斷裂，傷了他們的肩頭； 他們倚靠你， 你就折斷、扭傷了他們的腰。

ccb.text: 当他们用手握住你的时候，你就断裂，刺伤了他们的肩；当他们倚靠你的时候，你就折断，闪了他们的腰。
